name: ptychopetalum olacoides
mechanism: Likely mediated in part by flavonoid/polyphenol antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activity; Alkaloid constituents can modulate neuronal signaling pathways
contraindications: avoid in patients with hypertension or cardiac issues
safetyNotes: Moderate risk: side effects or medication interactions are plausible. Avoid use during pregnancy unless advised by a clinician; Do not combine with serotonergic drugs or MAOIs without medical guidance.
